title: woof story-executor result
description: Written by the story-executor before clean exit (exit 0). The wf-run driver reads this and branches on outcome. outcome=staged_for_verification means the diff is staged and ready for woof check stage-5; outcome=aborted_with_position means the executor decided to halt and has authored position prose; outcome=empty_diff means no code changes were made.

outcome.description: staged_for_verification: diff is staged; proceed to woof check stage-5. aborted_with_position: executor halted; driver writes gate from position prose. empty_diff: no changes; driver writes gate for operator confirmation.

commit_body.description: Optional multi-line commit body. Used by the driver when constructing the git commit message. Required for staged_for_verification outcome.

position.description: Prose position authored by the executor explaining why it halted. Required for aborted_with_position and empty_diff outcomes. The driver passes this verbatim to woof gate write.
